metadata.bitmap_width_semantics: runtime storage/draw width; compiler padding is retained
metadata.controller_mode_provenance: not encoded in the FONT leader; export follows runtime bit-array coordinates and does not assign 16-bit or 32-bit screen provenance
metadata.existence_semantics: no table; runtime treats all 128 character slots as existing

name: TR12B1
source_format: MIT CADR System 46 serialized QFASL FONT object
